title: Increase board to dashboard limit beyond 50 boards
excerpt: We would like to see the board limit increase over the current max of 50 to pull into dashboards and MyWork. 75 would be ideal. We have a very robust account where we manage over a thousand active projects with thousands …

posts.author: jenniferc (Jennifer Cunningham)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to see the board limit increase over the current max of 50 to pull into dashboards and MyWork. 75 would be ideal. We have a very robust account where we manage over a thousand active projects with thousands of items and sub-items (we exclusively assign work at the sub-item level) across multiple workspaces. Because of how our work is organized and the scale of the work we do, it is unrealistic to organize that in few than 50 boards. Our current workaround is to consolidate as much as we can into fewer than 50 boards and to use views to segment work. But we’ve reached the threshold of what we can consolidate, especially as our business grows. We also have to workaround by creating multiple dashboards - which causes a pain point for certain data points that we need to see across our entire organization.

posts.author: thaib (Bianca Thai)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would also like to see the board limit per dashboard increase beyond 50. We are hoping to build a 360 view of our customer information in a single place, with each customer having their own workspace and individual boards within to then build a dashboard to see trends across all customers. This would mean we’d pull data from more than 50 boards as we have 6 unique customers right now and continuing to grow.

I think we may be able to consolidate some of the data into a few boards but this makes it less scalable.

posts.author: vova_screenful (Vova Kenih)
posts.cookedHtml:
@jenniferc @thaib I feel your frustration with the 50 board limit. Have you looked into Analytics & Reports by Screenful as a potential solution for this?

I work at Screenful and wanted to mention our Analytics & Reports app. It is specifically designed to handle the use cases you’ve described. With this app, you can pull data from unlimited boards to create custom reports and dashboards. These can be accessed as widgets, board views, custom objects, scheduled email reports, or through a share link.

You could track trends across all your activity in monday.com, pulling data from thousands of boards with thousands of items and subitems.

Feel free to reach out if you’d like a product demo or have any questions.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@jenniferc @thaib this is one of the main reasons we built Master Data. The app doesn’t have any board connection limits. It syncs data from your Source Boards to a Master Board. You can also add the automations and app view to your Project Templates, so you don’t have to add them every time. You can either create a chart view, or connect your Master board to a Dashboard (if you are on Enterprise Tier and want to periodically email the Dashboard).
